testcase.name: @stynx-web/angular-ui > tracks toast lifecycle through the toast service
@stynx-web/angular-ui > supports sticky, timed, and clear toast lifecycle paths
@stynx-web/angular-ui > clamps pagination changes and emits page-change events
@stynx-web/angular-ui > normalizes pagination inputs and clamps navigation at both ends
@stynx-web/angular-ui > keeps simple component inputs and emitters wired
@stynx-web/angular-ui > tracks table rows with custom or JSON identity
@stynx-web/angular-ui > declares the toast container service dependency
